def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    # adv20 = rolling mean of volume over 20 days
    adv20 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=20)
    
    # sum(adv20, 14.7444) - rolling sum, window truncated to int
    sum_adv = rolling_sum(adv20, window=14)
    
    # correlation(close, sum_adv, 6.00049) - rolling correlation
    corr = correlation(pl.col('close'), sum_adv, window=6)
    
    # Ts_Rank of correlation over 20.4195 (truncated to 20)
    ts_rank_val = ts_rank(corr, window=20)
    
    # (open + close) - (vwap + open) = close - vwap
    cross_term = pl.col('close') - pl.col('vwap')
    
    # Cross-sectional rank per date
    rank_cross = rank(cross_term).over('date')
    
    # Compare: (ts_rank < rank_cross) * -1
    factor = pl.when(ts_rank_val < rank_cross).then(-1).otherwise(0)
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
